author: user-x1
text: spotify discover weekly is just my own playlist read back to me at this point. same artists every single week, total echo chamber

author: user-x2
text: why do i save 10 songs off release radar and then never listen to them again. nothing ever sticks lol

author: user-x3
text: trying to get into jazz but i keep bouncing off it. i need a guided on-ramp not a 5 hour playlist someone help

author: user-x4
text: stuck in a rut listening to the same songs on repeat and the algorithm refuses to break me out of the loop

author: user-x5
text: give me a dial for how adventurous my recs are. some days i want comfort, some days i want a real stretch

author: user-x6
text: discover weekly used to find me artists i'd never have found myself. now it's all safe picks i already know. discovery is broken

author: user-x7
text: the recs never tell me WHY a song was picked. i don't trust a recommendation that comes with no reason

author: user-x8
text: as a busy parent i have zero time to crate dig. i just want good new music to come to me with no effort
